verdict.note: issue #60 reproduced: a Task-subagent PreToolUse payload (real captured payload — top-level agent_id, parent session_id) fed through dispatch.sh flips the parent's parked declaration to active and wipes the note; the following Stop is then blocked by stop-gate as 'undeclared stop' (exit 2). Payloads captured live from claude 2.1.207 running a real Task subagent.

note: re-filing against the HEAD that carries the scenario declaration

verdict.note: issue #60 reproduced: a Task-subagent PreToolUse payload (real captured payload — top-level agent_id, parent session_id) fed through dispatch.sh flips the parent's parked declaration to active and wipes the note; the following Stop is then blocked by stop-gate as 'undeclared stop' (exit 2). Payloads captured live from claude 2.1.207 running a real Task subagent.

fix verified on the same scenario: the real captured subagent payload (top-level agent_id) leaves the parked declaration + note untouched, the following Stop passes stop-gate (exit 0, no block), and the parent's own payload (no agent_id) still flips to active. hp_is_subagent scans only the pre-tool_input prefix — adversarial probes (MCP param named agent_id, escaped content, prompt text) all correctly non-match; regression pinned in hook-dispatch.test.ts.
